mapper.sql: id, scope_type, scope_id, operation, status, scanned_count, parsed_count, skipped_count, failed_count, indexed_document_count, indexed_chunk_count, failed_document_count, failures_json, phase, progress_current, progress_total, current_item, queued_at, started_at, completed_at, duration_ms, error_message, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_folder_runs ( id, scope_type, scope_id, operation, status, scanned_count, parsed_count, skipped_count, failed_count, indexed_document_count, indexed_chunk_count, failed_document_count, failures_json, phase, progress_current, progress_total, current_item, queued_at, started_at, completed_at, duration_ms, error_message, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{scopeType}, #{scopeId}, #{operation}, #{status}, #{scannedCount}, #{parsedCount}, #{skippedCount}, #{failedCount}, #{indexedDocumentCount}, #{indexedChunkCount}, #{failedDocumentCount}, #{failuresJson}, #{phase}, #{progressCurrent}, #{progressTotal}, #{currentItem}, #{queuedAt}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{durationMs}, #{errorMessage}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM knowledge_folder_runs WHERE scope_type = #{scopeType} AND ((#{scopeId} IS NULL AND scope_id IS NULL) OR scope_id = #{scopeId}) AND operation = #{operation} AND status IN ('QUEUED', 'RUNNING', 'CANCELLING') ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM knowledge_folder_runs WHERE status IN ('RUNNING', 'CANCELLING') ORDER BY started_at ASC, created_at ASC
SELECT FROM knowledge_folder_runs WHERE status = 'QUEUED' ORDER BY queued_at ASC, created_at ASC

SELECT FROM knowledge_folder_runs WHERE status IN ('QUEUED', 'RUNNING', 'CANCELLING') ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'RUNNING' THEN 0 WHEN 'CANCELLING' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, COALESCE(started_at, queued_at, created_at) ASC
SELECT FROM knowledge_folder_runs WHERE (#{scopeType} IS NULL OR scope_type = #{scopeType}) AND (#{scopeId} IS NULL OR scope_id = #{scopeId}) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM knowledge_folder_runs WHERE (#{scopeType} IS NULL OR scope_type = #{scopeType}) AND (#{scopeId} IS NULL OR scope_id = #{scopeId}) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM knowledge_folder_runs WHERE (#{scopeType} IS NULL OR scope_type = #{scopeType}) AND (#{scopeId} IS NULL OR scope_id = #{scopeId})

SELECT FROM knowledge_folder_runs run WHERE created_at = ( SELECT MAX(inner_run.created_at) FROM knowledge_folder_runs inner_run WHERE inner_run.scope_type = run.scope_type AND ((inner_run.scope_id IS NULL AND run.scope_id IS NULL) OR inner_run.scope_id = run.scope_id) ) ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM knowledge_folder_runs ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_folder_runs SET status = 'RUNNING', phase = #{phase}, progress_current = 0, progress_total = #{progressTotal}, current_item = #{currentItem}, started_at = #{startedAt}, updated_at = #{startedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'QUEUED'

UPDATE knowledge_folder_runs SET phase = #{phase}, progress_current = #{progressCurrent}, progress_total = #{progressTotal}, current_item = #{currentItem}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('RUNNING', 'CANCELLING')

UPDATE knowledge_folder_runs SET status = 'CANCELLED', phase = 'CANCELLED', completed_at = #{completedAt}, duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE MAX(0, #{completedAt} - started_at) END, error_message = #{message}, updated_at = #{completedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('QUEUED', 'RUNNING', 'CANCELLING')

UPDATE knowledge_folder_runs SET status = #{status}, scanned_count = #{scannedCount}, parsed_count = #{parsedCount}, skipped_count = #{skippedCount}, failed_count = #{failedCount}, indexed_document_count = #{indexedDocumentCount}, indexed_chunk_count = #{indexedChunkCount}, failed_document_count = #{failedDocumentCount}, failures_json = #{failuresJson}, phase = 'COMPLETED', progress_current = #{progressCurrent}, progress_total = #{progressTotal}, current_item = NULL, completed_at = #{completedAt}, duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE MAX(0, #{completedAt} - started_at) END, error_message = NULL, updated_at = #{completedAt} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE knowledge_folder_runs SET status = 'FAILED', phase = 'FAILED', completed_at = #{completedAt}, duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE MAX(0, #{completedAt} - started_at) END, error_message = #{message}, updated_at = #{completedAt} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE knowledge_folder_runs SET status = CASE WHEN status = 'QUEUED' THEN 'CANCELLED' ELSE 'FAILED' END, phase = CASE WHEN status = 'QUEUED' THEN 'CANCELLED' ELSE 'FAILED' END, completed_at = #{completedAt}, duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE MAX(0, #{completedAt} - started_at) END, error_message = CASE WHEN status = 'QUEUED' THEN #{queuedMessage} ELSE #{runningMessage} END, updated_at = #{completedAt} WHERE status IN ('QUEUED', 'RUNNING', 'CANCELLING')
